scripts.build: npm run build:admin && astro build && node scripts/verify-llm-artifacts.mjs
scripts.build:content: npm run sync:notion && npm run build:admin && astro build && node scripts/verify-llm-artifacts.mjs
scripts.build:admin: cd admin && npm install && npm run build && cp -R dist/. ../public/admin/
scripts.check:functions: tsc -p functions/tsconfig.json && wrangler pages functions build functions --outfile .wrangler/functions-bundle/index.js
scripts.test: npm run test:sync && npm run test:build && npm run test:webhook && npm run test:types
